positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a celestial forest at twilight. The main subject is a group of bioluminescent, stylized trees with glowing, ethereal canopies. Amongst the trees, whimsical constellations are forming and connecting, represented by glowing, geometric lines and stylized star clusters. The composition should be symmetrical and centered, featuring strong silhouettes against a gradient sky that transitions from deep indigo to soft lilac. Use bold, solid color blocks for the flora and vibrant neon cyan and magenta for the light effects. The artwork must be highly detailed, vector-illustration quality, suitable for repeat pattern tiling, and possess a clean, graphic silhouette aesthetic. Studio shot, high contrast, cinematic lighting, print-friendly graphic design.
negative: blur, noise, grain, watermark, signature, text, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, artifacts, messy, realistic photography, gradients, cluttered, logos, writing
